features.description: QA Round 7 — Mobile User audit. Read ALL files: app/page.tsx, app/album/[slug]/AlbumPageClient.tsx, app/track/[slug]/TrackPageClient.tsx, app/songs/page.tsx, app/about/page.tsx, components/NowPlayingBar.tsx, components/TrackRow.tsx, components/VoteButtons.tsx, components/GlobalNav.tsx, components/ThemeToggle.tsx, components/KeyboardShortcuts.tsx, components/SyncedLyrics.tsx (or LyricsDisplay). Check for: horizontal overflow, touch targets under 44px, hidden elements that should show, text truncation, layout overflow. Write content/qa/round7-mobile-audit.md. Every issue must have severity, file:line, what's wrong, and how to fix. DONE: Audit exists. DO NOT TOUCH: code. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.

Fix ALL CRITICAL and HIGH issues from Round 7 mobile audit. Read content/qa/round7-mobile-audit.md. For every CRITICAL and HIGH issue, make the fix described. If a fix risks breaking something, skip it. DONE: All critical/high mobile issues fixed. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.

QA Round 7 — Performance audit. Read app/layout.tsx, lib/albums.ts (check file size with wc -c), app/page.tsx, app/track/[slug]/TrackPageClient.tsx. Check: (1) How big is lib/albums.ts? Run `wc -c lib/albums.ts`. If over 300KB, that's too much client-side JS. (2) Are images using Next.js Image with width/height? (3) Are there unnecessary client-side fetches on every page load? (4) Could any pages be server components instead of client? (5) Is the audio element preloading too aggressively? Write content/qa/round7-performance-audit.md with specific issues and fixes. DONE: Audit exists. DO NOT TOUCH: code. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.

Fix the #1 performance issue from Round 7 performance audit. Read content/qa/round7-performance-audit.md. Implement the single highest-impact performance fix. Common fixes: lazy-load data, split large files, reduce bundle size. DONE: Top perf issue fixed. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.

QA Round 7 — First-time visitor audit. Read app/page.tsx, components/OnboardingTooltips.tsx, components/TrackRow.tsx, components/NowPlayingBar.tsx, app/about/page.tsx. Walk through the first 60 seconds as a new visitor from Lenny's Slack. Focus on: (1) Is the tagline clear? (2) How fast to first play? (3) What would make them share? (4) What's confusing? (5) What's missing? Write content/qa/round7-visitor-audit.md. DONE: Audit exists. DO NOT TOUCH: code. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.
Fix ALL CRITICAL and HIGH issues from Round 7 visitor audit. Read content/qa/round7-visitor-audit.md. Fix every critical and high issue. DONE: All fixed. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.

QA Round 7 — Content accuracy spot-check. Read lib/albums.ts. Pick 5 tracks at random (use different albums). For each, use mcp__lennysdata__search_content to verify: (1) guest actually appeared on Lenny's podcast, (2) keyQuote is real, (3) source URLs are valid. Write content/qa/round7-accuracy-audit.md. DONE: Audit exists. DO NOT TOUCH: code. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.

Fix accuracy issues from Round 7 spot-check. Read content/qa/round7-accuracy-audit.md. Fix any wrong attributions, quotes, or URLs in lib/albums.ts. Use Lenny MCP to verify corrections. DONE: Fixed. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.
Fix ALL MEDIUM issues from Round 7 mobile audit. Read content/qa/round7-mobile-audit.md. Fix every MEDIUM severity issue. DONE: All medium mobile issues fixed. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.
Fix ALL MEDIUM issues from Round 7 visitor audit. Read content/qa/round7-visitor-audit.md. Fix every MEDIUM severity issue. DONE: All medium visitor issues fixed. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.
